articles.title: Cardano Surpasses $6 Billion in Daily Transactions – Could It Trump Tron’s TRX, Dogecoin, and XRP?
articles.description: The Cardano (ADA) blockchain has seen a notable rise in transactions since the early September Chang hard fork. The network growth has contributed to a gain in ADA price as the coin has emerged among the top performers in the last 24 hours. According to an X post by TapTools, the Cardano blockchain surpassed $6 […]

articles.title: Solana Breakpoint Events You Can’t Miss This Year
articles.description: Breakpoint is almost upon us! Don’t miss these side events and crucial presentations.

articles.title: VanEck Exec Spotlights SWIFT Ethereum Use Case, Is ETH Rally Close?
articles.description: A recent update from SWIFT (Society for Worldwide Interbank Financial Telecommunication), has sparked speculations of a possible price rally for Ethereum. Titled Streamlining the Global Movement of Digital Assets and Currencies, a SWIFT blog post shared on X, highlighted efforts to provide real-world solutions to facilitate transactions between members and regulated digital assets. Notably,...

articles.title: Cardano's Price Increased More Than 7% Within 24 hours
articles.description: Over the past 24 hours, Cardano's (CRYPTO: ADA) price has risen 7.29% to $0.36. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 9.0% gain, moving from $0.33 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $3.09. read more

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Long-Term Holders Offload Coins Amid Rising Profits
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has bucked the general market trend with an 11% price surge over the past week. Amid rising prices, transactions involving the altcoin have become profitable, prompting long-term holders to sell some of their coins. Although profit-taking activity is underway, the 11th altcoin by market capitalization seeks to maintain its uptrend. Cardano Long Holders Lock in...

articles.title: Chainlink Data Feeds goes live on Soneium’s Minato testnet
articles.description: Decentralized oracle network Chainlink announced today that Soneium, the next-generation Ethereum layer 2 blockchain developed by Sony Block Solutions Labs, has joined the Chainlink Scale program, granting it access to Chainlink Data Feeds on Soneium's Minato testnet.Chainlink Data Feeds, trusted by numerous entities like Base, Starknet, and Sonic Labs (formerly known as Fantom Foundation),...

articles.title: Sony To Integrate Chainlink For Cross-Chain Interoperability For Soneium L2
articles.description: Soneium also launched support for Chainlink’s data feeds on testnet and is joining Chainlink’s Scale program.

articles.title: CleanSpark Expands Bitcoin Mining
articles.description: CleanSpark is expanding its Bitcoin mining operations in Tennessee, despite rising competition and challenges from increased mining difficulty and market declines.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs See $43M Outflow
articles.description: Bitcoin ETFs faced a $43 million outflow on Wednesday, ending a two-day winning streak, with ARKB leading the decline amid rising market volatility.

articles.title: Altseason Upon Us? These Altcoins Surged the Most Despite BTC, ETH Weekly Retracements
articles.description: FUD may have created an opening for altcoins as several projects posted double-digit gains despite Bitcoin and Ethereum's struggles.
